top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Midtown Manhattan Buildings Evacuated After Collapse Warning
top_signals.summary: Construction crews were pulled from a 37-story Midtown Manhattan building Tuesday morning after bricks were reported falling from the 21st floor, emergency officials said, prompting building evacuations and street closures. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Burnham warned of ‘unsustainable’ public finances by UK fiscal watchdog
top_signals.summary: Office for Budget Responsibility’s annual report says urgent action is needed to cut spending
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO to add up to five Northrop Grumman Triton drones for maritime surveillance
top_signals.summary: “It is genuinely made in NATO and is creating jobs on both sides of the Atlantic,” alliance Secretary-General Mark Rutte said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three tankers come under fire in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Qatari and Saudi ships among targets near Oman coast
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Noto Peninsula airport struck by earthquake gets Pokemon-themed rebrand
top_signals.summary: Over 100 Pokemon characters are painted on walls and other parts of the airport, and limited-edition merchandise and meals are available at shops and restaurants.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
